\tzpentry{ID5143}{Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5143 introduces Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\\mu\\) of a rotating body obeys \\(\\mu = k\\,m\\,r^2\\,\\omega\\)
\]
